title: Adaptor Ligation Mixture (E7370)

steps_raw.instruction: NEBNext Adaptor for Illumina 2.5 μl The NEBNext adaptor is provided in NEBNext Singleplex ( NEB #E7350 ) or Multiplex ( NEB #E7335 , #E7500 ) Oligos for Illumina. If DNA input is < 100 ng, dilute the NEBNext Adaptor for Illumina 1:10 in sterile water. Use immediately to a final concentration of 1.5 µM.
